values.description: Backend base URL (Spring Boot). Change to your deployed URL for production, e.g. https://your-app.onrender.com

ACTIVE Clerk JWT — used as Bearer token on every request. To get it: open the app → Admin Dashboard or your role Dashboard → click 'Get Token' → copy and paste here. Refresh before testing (tokens expire quickly).
Saved JWT for the ADMIN user. Get from Admin Dashboard → JWT Token card. Paste into clerk_token when testing admin-only endpoints.
Saved JWT for a MENTOR user. Get from Dashboard → JWT Token card (logged in as mentor). Paste into clerk_token when testing mentor endpoints.
Saved JWT for a STUDENT user. Get from Dashboard → JWT Token card (logged in as student). Paste into clerk_token when testing student endpoints.
Clerk user ID (format: user_xxxxxxxxx). Visible on the JWT Token card or GET /api/users/me response. Used by admin endpoints like GET /api/users/{clerkId}.
DB primary key of a mentor row. Update after calling POST /api/mentors or GET /api/mentors.
DB primary key of a student row. Update after calling POST /api/students or GET /api/students.
DB primary key of a session row. Update after calling POST /api/sessions or POST /api/sessions/book.
DB primary key of a subject row. Update after calling POST /api/subjects or GET /api/subjects.
Optional search term for mentor name (used by GET /api/mentors/search).
Optional search term for mentor profession (used by GET /api/mentors/search).
Optional search term for subject name (used by GET /api/subjects/search).
Optional search term for subject category (used by GET /api/subjects/search).
